positive: A highly detailed, graphic illustration featuring a stylized assemblage of forest flora and fauna, such as curled fern fronds, geometric moss patterns, elegant fox silhouettes, and blooming bellflowers. The style should be reminiscent of vintage natural history etchings mixed with modern geometric linocut art. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a cohesive, wearable patch design. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, charcoal black, and creamy off-white. Focus on strong, crisp silhouettes and clean linework with minimal gradients. The overall mood is magical, serene, and bold. High-resolution, vector-art quality.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, ugly, cropped, low detail, muted colors, photorealism, gradients, smoke, depth of field, grain
